headline: EU data centre efficiency: Scale and age drive stark performance divide
summary: Investing.com — A new analysis of over 700 European data centres reveals that identical sustainability metrics often mask vastly different operational realities, creating a complex "efficiency trap" for investors. A Jefferies report, released Monday, warns that headline Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) like Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE) must be probed alongside asset age, size, and geography to determine true long-term value.
